ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Volkoren speltvlokken 42%, Cichoreiwortelvezel 18%, Zonnebloemolie 10%, Amandelen 9%, Pompoenpitten 6%, Zonnebloempitten 6%, Tarwe-eiwit 4%, Water 3%, Specerijen 1,4%, Lecithinen 0,3%, Zout 0,3%
